description_long: This is a young adult woman standing with her arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She has shoulder-length straight hair and is dressed in a fitted short-sleeve top with a scoop neckline and a pair of high-waisted shorts. Her footwear consists of lace-up sneakers, and she appears to be wearing no visible accessories or carried items. The figure's build is average, and her posture is upright and balanced. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a casual, urban style suitable for warm weather. The overall appearance is clean and stylized, with smooth surfaces and clear garment separation.
description: A casually dressed young woman in a T-pose, wearing a fitted top, shorts, and sneakers, with shoulder-length straight hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, fitted top, shorts, and sneakers, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the curve of the back, and the side of the shorts and sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the scoop neckline of the top, and the back of the shorts and sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the side of the top and shorts, and the sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve fitted top and high-waisted shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
